setup: Gatot-suppression discriminator: 1 ordinary Lv 6.0 Infantry attacker (all hero slots vacant) vs 1 FC1 T1 Infantry defender led by Vulcanus ONLY (Gatot removed) - a rerun of the v5_R04 matchup without the Gatot kit, Vulcanus retained as the turn clock.

assumptions: S2 (1-unit side): 15 triggers => turns in [90, 95]; intersection [90, 92]

troop_passives_active.reason: defender fields no Lancers (Infantry mirror - passive-free)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: -4% enemy Troops Attack, once at battle start (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: +20% damage every 6th attack event of its side (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: True Strike
hero_skills.effect: per proc (turns 3,6,9,...): -12% enemy Infantry/Lancer Defense for 3 turns AND +12% own Marksmen's Attack for 1 turn (L1 scale; level not shown)

troop_passives_active.reason: attacker fields no Lancers (Infantry mirror - passive-free)

notes: DISCRIMINATOR BATTLE: same attacker loadout as MuellerAlpaca_v5_R04 (Inf panels identical 179.1/179.7/112.0/108.7), defender = the same Alpaca FC1 T1 account with Gatot REMOVED and Vulcanus retained as clock.

GATOT STAT AURA MEASURED: defender Infantry panels dropped from v5's 537.1/529.9/119.7/119.3 to 176.2/169.0/109.7/109.3 = exactly -360.9pp Attack, -360.9pp Defense, -10.0pp Lethality, -10.0pp Health. That uniform delta is the stat contribution of Alpaca's Gatot (his copy/level), now separated from skill effects.
Account identity + alliance state: defender Marksman panels 1049.5/1039.3/247.2/150.6 match the known Alpaca NoAlliance MM loadout (E-NIF R11/R12).

Law analysis at ingestion: attacker kill clock predicted 77.2 turns (K=12.524, G_w(Inf,6)=10.89, G_l(T1)=1.0, Vulcanus S1 x0.96) vs observed [90,92] -> obs/pred 1.18. The v5_R04 suppression (>=2.58x beyond captured stats) is ABSENT without Gatot; residual +18% is a new open finding.
Defender kill clock predicted ~966 turns (S2 x31/30, S3 shred x0.88, G_l(Inf,6)=0.749) >> 91: consistent with the uninjured attacker victory.
kills read from the Battle Details participant rows (attacker 1 / defender 0), cross-checked by the casualty identity (defender losses+injured = 1).
